name: Nagasaki-Bombing of ground Zero
description:
On August 9, 1945, the United States dropped a plutonium-core atomic bomb nicknamed "Fat Man" over Nagasaki, Japan. Detonating at 11:02 AM, the blast instantly killed approximately 40,000 people and destroyed nearly half the city. By the end of the year, the death toll reached roughly 74,000 due to severe burns and acute radiation sickness.

Nagasaki was bombed by the United States on August 9, 1945. The atomic bomb, nicknamed "Fat Man," was detonated at 11:02 AM local time during the final days of World War II.
creator: Rodimus_2011
